name: Pizza Rice Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place rice cakes on a baking sheet.
2. Spread the pizza sauce evenly over each rice cake.
3. Top with the remaining ingredients: sliced ripe olives, diced green pepper, sliced mushrooms, and shredded mozzarella cheese.
4. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
5. Serve immediately.
